title: VibeWarden Event Schema v1
description: Schema for all structured log events emitted by the VibeWarden security sidecar. Every event carries five top-level fields: schema_version, event_type, timestamp, ai_summary, and payload. Optional tracing fields (trace_id, span_id) are present when an active OTel span is associated with the event.

schema_version.description: The schema version. Always 'v1' for events produced by this release.

event_type.description: Identifies the kind of event. Dot-separated namespace (e.g. 'auth.success'). Unknown event types must be accepted and passed through — this schema is intentionally open to allow forward-compatible addition of new event types without breaking existing consumers.

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp of when the event occurred, in RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 format.

ai_summary.description: A concise human- and AI-readable sentence describing what happened. Includes the most relevant identifiers so an LLM can understand the event without reading the payload. Maximum 200 characters.

payload.description: Event-specific structured data. The set of keys is defined per event_type by the if/then constraints in this schema.

trace_id.description: OTel W3C trace ID (32 lowercase hex characters). Present only when the event is associated with an active tracing span.

span_id.description: OTel W3C span ID (16 lowercase hex characters). Present only when the event is associated with an active tracing span.

payload_proxy_started.description: Payload for proxy.started — emitted once when the reverse proxy is ready.

listen.description: Address the reverse proxy is listening on (e.g. ':443').

tls_provider.description: TLS certificate provider (e.g. 'letsencrypt', 'self-signed'). Empty string when tls_enabled is false.

security_headers_enabled.description: Whether the security headers middleware is active.

payload_proxy_kratos_flow.description: Payload for proxy.kratos_flow — emitted when a request is routed to the Kratos self-service API.

method.description: HTTP method of the request (e.g. 'GET', 'POST').

payload_auth_success.description: Payload for auth.success — emitted when a Kratos session is validated.

method.description: HTTP method of the authenticated request.

path.description: URL path of the authenticated request.

email.description: Email address of the authenticated identity.

payload_auth_failed.description: Payload for auth.failed — emitted when a request is rejected due to missing or invalid session.

method.description: HTTP method of the rejected request.

path.description: URL path of the rejected request.

reason.description: Short description of why the request was rejected.

detail.description: Optional additional detail (e.g. an error message). May be empty.

payload_auth_provider_unavailable.description: Payload for auth.provider_unavailable — emitted when Ory Kratos cannot be reached.

provider_url.description: URL of the unavailable auth provider.

error.description: Short description of the connectivity failure.

affected_path.description: URL path of the request that triggered discovery. Empty string when emitted from a health probe.

payload_auth_provider_recovered.description: Payload for auth.provider_recovered — emitted when Kratos is reachable again.

provider_url.description: URL of the recovered auth provider.

payload_api_key_success.description: Payload for auth.api_key.success — emitted when a request is authenticated via API key.

method.description: HTTP method of the authenticated request.

path.description: URL path of the authenticated request.

key_name.description: Human-readable name of the API key that was accepted.

scopes.description: List of scopes granted by the key.

payload_api_key_failed.description: Payload for auth.api_key.failed — emitted when a request is rejected due to a missing or invalid API key.

method.description: HTTP method of the rejected request.

path.description: URL path of the rejected request.

reason.description: Short description of why the request was rejected.

payload_api_key_forbidden.description: Payload for auth.api_key.forbidden — emitted when a valid key lacks required scopes.

method.description: HTTP method of the forbidden request.

path.description: URL path of the forbidden request.

key_name.description: Human-readable name of the API key that was presented.

key_scopes.description: List of scopes held by the key.

required_scopes.description: List of scopes required by the matching scope rule.

payload_jwt_valid.description: Payload for auth.jwt_valid — emitted when a JWT token passes all validation checks.

method.description: HTTP method of the authenticated request.

path.description: URL path of the authenticated request.

subject.description: The 'sub' claim value from the validated token.

issuer.description: The 'iss' claim value from the validated token.

audience.description: The 'aud' claim value that was validated against.

payload_jwt_invalid.description: Payload for auth.jwt_invalid — emitted when a JWT token fails validation.

method.description: HTTP method of the rejected request.

path.description: URL path of the rejected request.

detail.description: Optional additional detail. May be empty.

payload_jwt_expired.description: Payload for auth.jwt_expired — emitted when a JWT token is structurally valid but past expiry.

method.description: HTTP method of the rejected request.

path.description: URL path of the rejected request.

subject.description: The 'sub' claim value from the expired token.

expired_at.description: Time at which the token expired (value of the 'exp' claim), RFC 3339.

payload_jwks_refresh.description: Payload for auth.jwks_refresh — emitted when the JWKS cache is successfully refreshed.

jwks_url.description: URL from which the key set was fetched.

key_count.description: Number of keys in the refreshed key set.

payload_jwks_error.description: Payload for auth.jwks_error — emitted when fetching or parsing the JWKS fails.

jwks_url.description: URL that could not be reached.

detail.description: Error message describing what went wrong.

payload_rate_limit_hit.description: Payload for rate_limit.hit — emitted when a request is rejected for exceeding the rate limit.

limit_type.description: The kind of limit that was exceeded.

identifier.description: The value that was rate-limited: the client IP for type 'ip', or the user ID for type 'user'.

requests_per_second.description: Configured rate limit in tokens per second.

retry_after_seconds.description: Seconds the caller must wait before retrying.

path.description: URL path of the rate-limited request.

method.description: HTTP method of the rate-limited request.

client_ip.description: Client IP address. Present only when limit_type is 'user' and the IP is known.

payload_rate_limit_unidentified.description: Payload for rate_limit.unidentified_client — emitted when the client IP cannot be determined.

path.description: URL path of the rejected request.

method.description: HTTP method of the rejected request.

payload_rate_limit_store_fallback.description: Payload for rate_limit.store_fallback — emitted when Redis is unavailable and the limiter switches to in-memory.

reason.description: Short description of why the fallback was triggered.

store.description: The store now in use. Always 'memory' for this event type.

payload_rate_limit_store_recovered.description: Payload for rate_limit.store_recovered — emitted when the Redis store is reachable again.

store.description: The store now in use. Always 'redis' for this event type.

payload_request_blocked.description: Payload for request.blocked — emitted when a request is blocked by a security policy.

method.description: HTTP method of the blocked request.

path.description: URL path of the blocked request.

reason.description: Short description of why the request was blocked.

blocked_by.description: Middleware or policy that blocked the request (e.g. 'ip_blocklist', 'waf').

client_ip.description: Client IP address. Empty string if it could not be determined.

payload_tls_certificate_issued.description: Payload for tls.certificate_issued — emitted when a TLS certificate is obtained or renewed.

domain.description: Domain name for which the certificate was issued.

expires_at.description: Certificate expiry time in RFC 3339 format.

payload_user_created.description: Payload for user.created — emitted when a new user identity is created.

identity_id.description: Identity provider identifier for the new user.

email.description: Email address of the new user.

actor_id.description: Identifier of the admin who performed the action. Empty string when performed by the system.

payload_user_deleted.description: Payload for user.deleted — emitted when a user identity is deleted.

identity_id.description: Identity provider identifier of the deleted user.

email.description: Email address of the deleted user.

actor_id.description: Identifier of the admin who performed the action. Empty string when performed by the system.

reason.description: Optional human-readable explanation for the deletion. Empty string when not provided.

payload_user_deactivated.description: Payload for user.deactivated — emitted when a user identity is deactivated.

identity_id.description: Identity provider identifier of the deactivated user.

email.description: Email address of the deactivated user.

actor_id.description: Identifier of the admin who performed the action. Empty string when performed by the system.

reason.description: Optional human-readable explanation for the deactivation. Empty string when not provided.

payload_audit_log_failure.description: Payload for audit.log_failure — emitted when an audit entry cannot be persisted.

action.description: Audit action that failed to be persisted (e.g. 'user.created').

user_id.description: User affected by the action that was not audited.

error.description: Short description of the persistence failure.

payload_ip_filter_blocked.description: Payload for ip_filter.blocked — emitted when a request is rejected by the IP filter plugin.

method.description: HTTP method of the blocked request.

path.description: URL path of the blocked request.

payload_secret_rotated.description: Payload for secret.rotated — emitted when a dynamic secret is successfully rotated.

secret_name.description: Human-readable name or identifier of the rotated secret.

backend.description: Secret backend that performed the rotation (e.g. 'openbao', 'vault').

payload_secret_rotation_failed.description: Payload for secret.rotation_failed — emitted when a dynamic secret rotation attempt fails.

secret_name.description: Human-readable name or identifier of the secret whose rotation failed.

payload_secret_health_check.description: Payload for secret.health_check — emitted on each scheduled secret health check run.

findings.description: List of findings from the health check. Empty array when healthy.

payload_upstream_timeout.description: Payload for upstream.timeout — emitted when the upstream does not respond within the configured timeout.

method.description: HTTP method of the timed-out request.

path.description: URL path of the timed-out request.

payload_upstream_retry.description: Payload for upstream.retry — emitted each time the retry middleware re-sends a failed upstream request.

method.description: HTTP method of the retried request.

path.description: URL path of the retried request.

attempt.description: Retry attempt number (1 = first retry, 2 = second retry, ...).

status_code.description: Upstream HTTP status code that triggered the retry.

payload_upstream_health_changed.description: Payload for upstream.health_changed — emitted when the upstream health status transitions.

consecutive.description: Number of consecutive successes or failures that triggered the transition.

upstream_url.description: URL that was probed (host + path, no credentials).

last_error.description: Error message from the most recent probe. Present only when new_status is 'unhealthy'.

payload_circuit_breaker_opened.description: Payload for circuit_breaker.opened — emitted when the circuit breaker trips from Closed to Open.

threshold.description: Consecutive failure count that tripped the circuit.

timeout_seconds.description: Duration the circuit will remain open before allowing a probe, in seconds.

payload_circuit_breaker_half_open.description: Payload for circuit_breaker.half_open — emitted when the circuit breaker enters HalfOpen state.

timeout_seconds.description: Open timeout that elapsed before the probe, in seconds.

payload_circuit_breaker_closed.description: Payload for circuit_breaker.closed — emitted when the circuit breaker returns to Closed after a successful probe.

payload_egress_request.description: Payload for egress.request — emitted when the egress proxy begins forwarding an outbound request.

route.description: Matched egress route name. Empty string when unmatched.

method.description: HTTP method of the outbound request.

url.description: Destination URL of the outbound request. Never includes bearer tokens or credentials.

trace_id.description: W3C trace-id of the inbound request. Empty string when no trace context is available.

payload_egress_response.description: Payload for egress.response — emitted when the egress proxy receives a complete response.

route.description: Matched egress route name. Empty string when unmatched.

method.description: HTTP method of the outbound request.

url.description: Destination URL of the outbound request.

status_code.description: HTTP status code returned by the external service.

attempts.description: Total number of upstream attempts (1 = no retries).

trace_id.description: W3C trace-id of the inbound request. Empty string when no trace context is available.

payload_egress_blocked.description: Payload for egress.blocked — emitted when the egress proxy refuses to forward a request due to policy.

route.description: Matched route name. Empty string when no route matched.

method.description: HTTP method of the blocked outbound request.

url.description: Destination URL of the blocked outbound request.

reason.description: Short human-readable description of why the request was blocked.

trace_id.description: W3C trace-id of the inbound request. Empty string when no trace context is available.

payload_egress_error.description: Payload for egress.error — emitted when the egress proxy encounters a transport-level error.

route.description: Matched egress route name. Empty string when unmatched.

method.description: HTTP method of the failed outbound request.

url.description: Destination URL of the failed outbound request.

error.description: Human-readable error message. Never includes credentials.

attempts.description: Total number of upstream attempts made before failing.

trace_id.description: W3C trace-id of the inbound request. Empty string when no trace context is available.

payload_egress_sanitized.description: Payload for egress.sanitized — emitted after the egress proxy applies PII redaction rules.

method.description: HTTP method of the outbound request.

url.description: Destination URL of the outbound request.

redacted_headers.description: Count of request headers whose log values were replaced with '[REDACTED]'.

stripped_query_params.description: Count of query parameters removed from the request URL before forwarding.

redacted_body_fields.description: Count of JSON body fields replaced with '[REDACTED]' before the request was forwarded.

total_redacted.description: Total count of redacted fields (sum of the three categories above).

trace_id.description: W3C trace-id of the inbound request. Empty string when no trace context is available.

payload_egress_response_invalid.description: Payload for egress.response_invalid — emitted when the upstream response fails per-route validation.

method.description: HTTP method of the outbound request.

url.description: Destination URL of the outbound request.

status_code.description: HTTP status code returned by the upstream.

content_type.description: Content-Type header value returned by the upstream.

reason.description: Short human-readable description of why the response was considered invalid.

trace_id.description: W3C trace-id of the inbound request. Empty string when no trace context is available.

payload_egress_rate_limit_hit.description: Payload for egress.rate_limit_hit — emitted when an outbound request is rejected by a per-route rate limit.

route.description: Egress route name whose rate limit was exceeded.

limit.description: Configured rate limit in requests per second.

retry_after_seconds.description: Seconds the caller should wait before retrying.

payload_egress_circuit_breaker_opened.description: Payload for egress.circuit_breaker.opened — emitted when the per-route egress circuit breaker trips.

route.description: Egress route name whose circuit tripped.

threshold.description: Consecutive failure count that tripped the circuit.

timeout_seconds.description: Duration the circuit will remain open before allowing a probe request, in seconds.

payload_egress_circuit_breaker_closed.description: Payload for egress.circuit_breaker.closed — emitted when the per-route egress circuit breaker returns to Closed.

route.description: Egress route name whose circuit closed.
